reasoning: The goal is to address your lactate clearance limiter with a focused ride. Your last ride was a low-intensity session after a longer rest, so we'll start controlled and push 5-min to 20-min power. This will build your capacity for the extended climb in the Alpine Loop.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Perform intervals alternating 4 minutes at 242W-256W (105-108% FTP) followed by 2 minutes at 201W-218W (85-92% FTP). Repeat 5 times.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
